description:
I joined as a developer and ended up being much more than that — part operator, part growth driver, part fixer of whatever broke next. I worked across a group of hospitality and tourism businesses: Ondas de Angelo (boat tours on the Tagus River in Lisbon, one of the city's top-rated operators), the Danube Delta boat tour operation in Romania, ManuBBQ and its 7 sub-brands (restaurants), and ManuBnB (short-term accommodation).

Tech & product work
Built and maintained web properties using React, Astro, Supabase, Directus, and various CMS platforms — including manubbq.ro and manubnb.com
Designed and automated workflows with n8n: booking confirmations, CRM syncs, payment notifications, and internal reporting pipelines
Integrated OTA platforms (Booking.com, GetYourGuide, Viator, Wolt, Bolt, Glovo) and the hotel PMS 5StarDesk / Travelminit booking system into unified operational flows
Led a small dev team, coordinating between designers, external contractors, and non-technical stakeholders

Operations & growth
Managed restaurant operations for ManuBBQ across 7 brands on Wolt, Bolt, and Glovo — handling menus, availability, pricing, and dispute resolution
Ran OTA operations for ManuBnB on Booking.com and other platforms: listing optimization, rate management, availability sync, and guest communications
Handled multi-channel customer support across email, booking platforms, and messaging — resolving issues, rescheduling, refunds, and escalations
Redesigned and redeveloped the company's web app from requirements gathering through to deployment. Frontend in AstroJS, backend in Directus. Full lifecycle: UX, build, test, optimise, deploy.
Web development, UI/UX design, and graphic design work for clients internationally. Started in graphic design, moved through UI/UX, landed on development — where the real challenge is.
